response.overview: Baseball: Beyond Belief explores the compelling depths of how baseball and faith intertwine in powerful and surprising ways. Filmmaker John Scheinfeld ("What The Hell Happened to Blood, Sweat and Tears?," "Chasing Trane," "The U.S. vs. John Lennon") centers this engaging, uplifting and poignant film on the significant and every day relevance the beloved pastime of baseball has in our lives. Whether it be sitting in a stadium or in a place of faith, a sense of community inspires fans and followers alike across the globe.
response.title: Baseball: Beyond Belief
